---
title: "The processing from A through Ö"
warning: false
message: false
---

## TODO

* Recompile auxillary data
* Add landings data

## Data compilation sequence

```
R/00_auxillary-data.R
R/01_vid-mid.R
R/02-1_logbooks-merge.R
R/02-2-logbooks-processing.R
R/02-3_logbooks-for-ais.R
R/03-stk-tails_parquet_v02.R

```

Should really set this up as a bash-script

Note: Log of the running kept in directory lgs

## Usage

```{r}
library(raster)
library(viridis)
library(leaflet)
library(sf)
library(tidyterra)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(omar)
con <- connect_mar()
# functions --------------------------------------------------------------------
grid_species <- function(SID = 61, d, CT, dx = 300, GID = 6) {
  d |> 
    filter(speed >= s1 & speed <= s2) |> 
    filter(gid == GID) |> 
    inner_join(CT |> 
                 filter(sid == SID),
               by = "visir") |> 
    group_by(visir) |> 
    # not sure if this works properly
    mutate(n = length(visir),
           catch = catch / n) |> 
    ungroup() |> 
    filter(lon >= -33, lon <= -10,
           lat >=  62, lat <= 68.5) |> 
    mutate(x = x %/% dx * dx + dx/2,
           y = y %/% dx * dx + dx/2) |> 
    group_by(x, y) |> 
    summarise(z = sum(catch) / 1e3,   # tonnes
              .groups = "drop") |> 
    collect() ->
    g
  
  return(g)
  
}

raster_helper <- function(g) {
  g |> 
    mutate(z = ifelse(z > quantile(z, 0.99), quantile(z, 0.99), z)) |> 
    raster::rasterFromXYZ(crs = "EPSG:3857")
}

## colour palettes -------------------------------------------------------------
hyp <- 
  tidyterra:::extract_pal(tidyterra::hypsometric_tints_db, 
                          palette = "etopo1_hypso") |> 
  pull(hex)
inf <- inferno(12, alpha = 1, begin = 0, end = 1, direction = -1)

# data -------------------------------------------------------------------------
sc_arrow <-
  tribble(~gid,  ~s1,  ~s2,
          -199, 1.000, 3.000,
          1,    0.375, 2.750,
          2,    0.125, 2.500,
          3,    0.025, 2.000,
          5,    0.250, 3.250,
          6,    2.625, 5.500,
          7,    2.625, 6.000,
          9,    2.375, 4.000,
          12,    0.050, 2.250,
          14,    1.750, 3.250,
          15,    0.500, 5.500,
          38,    0.250, 4.750,
          40,    0.250, 6.000) |> 
  mutate(gid = as.integer(gid)) |> 
  arrow::as_arrow_table()
con <- 
  open_dataset("~/stasi/trails/trails-parquet_v02") |> 
  left_join(sc_arrow)
dx <- 300
q <- 
  con |> 
  mutate(year = year(time)) |> 
  filter(between(lon, -30, -20),
         between(lat, 65, 67.5),
         speed >= s1, speed <= s2,
         gid == 6) |> 
  mutate(x = x %/% dx * dx + dx/2,
         y = y %/% dx * dx + dx/2,
         one = 1L) |> 
  group_by(x, y) |> 
  summarise(z = sum(one),
            .groups = "drop")
ais <-
  q |> 
  collect()
island <- 
  geo::island |> 
  st_as_sf(coords = c("lon", "lat"),
           crs = 4326) |> 
  st_transform(crs = 3857) |> 
  st_coordinates() |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  rename(x = X, y = Y)
ais |> 
  mutate(z = ifelse(z > quantile(z, 0.99),
                    quantile(z, 0.99),
                    z)) |> 
  ggplot() +
  theme_void() +
  geom_tile(aes(x, y, fill = z)) +
  geom_polygon(data = island, aes(x, y),
               fill = "grey80") +
  tidyterra::scale_fill_hypso_c() +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = range(ais$x), ylim = range(ais$y)) +
  labs(fill = "Effort")
```
